Steps.Text: Select to boot from IPv4 and press enter when an IP is shown
Steps.Output: Booted into PXE and received IP address

Steps.Text: At configuration manager press F8 to bring up the command prompt
Enter diskpart > select disk 0 > clean then exit the command prompt
Select the Production Win11 image (PRD abbreviation)
Select Midwest > NAD > Enter Computer Name (eg. MAD-WS#####)
Click Set Variables and then Continue
Log into VA - Citrix Access
Launch Active Directory and navigate to Staging OU
Move computer from Staging OU to Workstations OU
Steps.Output: Moved computer from Staging OU to Workstations OU

Steps.Text: Update the description of the computer object
Launch dBAT, Search for computer name, and add to list
Scan computer confirm that image baseline is the same as your computer
Log into computer and run sync in Company Portal settings
Launch command prompt and run gpupdate
Restart computer, Interrupt boot with F10 and update BIOS
Install driver updates from network share
Confirm that computer pings with computer name
Steps.Output: Confirmed computer pings with computer name

Steps.Text: Restart computer and unplug from ethernet
Log into computer and confirm that computer connects to wireless and pings
Restart computer again and deploy as needed
Interrupt computer startup with F12 and select boot from IPv4
Steps.Output: Booted into PXE and received IP address

Steps.Text: At configuration manager press F8 to bring up the command prompt
Enter diskpart > select disk 0 > clean then exit the command prompt
Select the Production Win11 image (PRD abbreviation)
Select Midwest > NAD > Enter Computer Name (eg. MAD-LT#####)
Click Set Variables and then Continue
Log into VA - Citrix Access
Launch Active Directory and navigate to Staging OU
Move computer from Staging OU to Laptops OU
Steps.Output: Moved computer from Staging OU to Laptops OU

Steps.Text: Update the description of the computer object
Launch dBAT, Search for computer name, and add to list
Scan computer confirm that image baseline is the same as your computer
Log into computer and run sync in Company Portal settings
Launch command prompt and run gpupdate
Upgrade the BIOS to the latest version from the support website
Install driver updates from the support website
Confirm that computer pings with computer name
Steps.Output: Confirmed computer pings with computer name

Steps.Text: Restart computer and deploy as needed
Launch Zebra Setup Utilities and open communication with the printer
Edit the IP in the code in OneNote and paste it in the top box
Steps.Output: Edited the IP address in the code

Steps.Text: Send the code to the printer and wait for a response
Power cycle printer and confirm it pings with IP address provided
Steps.Output: Power cycled printer and confirmed it pings
